title: Why You're Still Better Than AI at Editing Documents - CS50 Tech Talk
summary: CS50 Tech Talk argues that humans remain superior to AI at reliably editing complex documents like Word files, because AI struggles with the non-linear, rule-based internal structure of formats like .docx. The talk positions document editing as a software problem rather than a text problem, requiring trustworthy automation when scaling to thousands of documents.
